description: Inflation-linked structured channel note pricer built on the Spire framework. Coupons and redemption are scaled by a projected inflation index ratio. For plain-vanilla government linkers use inflation_linked instead.

required_fields.name: accrual_day_count
required_fields.description: Day count convention for the note leg

required_fields.name: collateral
required_fields.description: Collateral bond object — see spire fields for full sub-object structure

fields.name: index_ratio_at_eval
fields.description: Current index ratio at evaluation date (current_cpi / base_cpi)

fields.name: annual_index_growth_rate
fields.description: Forward flat inflation rate used to project the index ratio (decimal or %)

fields.name: coupon_multiplier
fields.description: Real coupon rate / multiplier applied to each inflation-adjusted coupon payment

optional_fields.name: index_linked_terms
optional_fields.description: Contractual term fields — used for completeness validation only, not pricing

optional_fields.name: missing_contractual_terms
optional_fields.description: List of terms acknowledged as contractually missing

optional_fields.name: credit_spread_bp
optional_fields.description: Issuer spread on the note (basis points)

optional_fields.name: collateral_spread_bp
optional_fields.description: Additional spread on the collateral leg (basis points)

optional_fields.name: issuer_call
optional_fields.description: Set to 'Applicable' to enable a call schedule
